slides.heading: Top to Bottom
slides.content: Rule #1: Always start from the top of the character and work your way down.

slides.heading: Left to Right
slides.content: Rule #2: Horizontal strokes are written from the left side to the right side.

slides.heading: The 'Hook' (Hane)
slides.content: Some strokes end with a tiny flick or 'hook'. This is essential for proper calligraphy.

slides.heading: Balance
slides.content: Try to imagine a square box around the character. Keep the strokes centered and balanced.

slides.heading: The Brush Feel
slides.content: Even with a pen, imagine the pressure of a brush. Start heavy, end light.
